title: Chaetochloa polystachya
taxonomy: Chaetochloa polystachya is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Chloridoideae. The genus Chaetochloa is often merged with the genus Pseudochaetochloa, which can lead to some classification confusion. Some sources may group Chaetochloa polystachya under Pseudochaetochloa, but further research is required for a clear classification. The classification of this species may vary depending on the source and taxonomic system used.

intro: Chaetochloa polystachya, also known as Guinea grass, is a species of grass native to tropical regions, characterized by its ability to thrive in a variety of environments.
